name: Atlantic Coast Conference
prestige: Elite — #1 men's soccer conference nationally
mlsPipeline: Highest in college soccer — leads all conferences in MLS picks 2020–2026
scholarships: Up to 9.9 athletic equivalencies split across roster
desc: The most prestigious men's soccer conference in the United States. Virginia holds 7 national titles. Clemson won in 2021 and 2023. Maryland under Cirovski is the all-time MLS picks leader. ACC has produced more MLS #1 overall draft picks than any other conference in the past decade. The competition level is equivalent to a top European second division in terms of athleticism and tactical sophistication.
olivierNote: 13 guide schools in the ACC — the most of any conference. Clemson (Noonan, 2× champion) is the #1 pipeline program nationally. SMU won the 2025 ACC Tournament (first ever). Virginia 7× champions. UNC ACC Regular Season champs 2023. Notre Dame 27 MLS picks. Stanford and Cal add West Coast depth. All 13 are viable targets depending on Olivier's profile level.

name: Big Ten Conference
prestige: Elite — #2 overall, dominant Midwest and West
mlsPipeline: Top 5 — Indiana all-time leader; Maryland most all-time picks; UCLA strong West Coast pipeline
desc: The Big Ten expanded to include West Coast powerhouses UCLA and USC in 2024. Indiana is the most decorated men's soccer program in US history (8 NCAA titles). UCLA joins as a 4-time national champion. Maryland has produced the most MLS picks of any college program all-time (49 + 7 homegrown under Cirovski). The conference now spans both coasts.
olivierNote: All 14 Big Ten schools now fully profiled. Indiana and UCLA are the historical elite. Maryland under Cirovski is the all-time MLS pipeline leader. UCLA (LA lifestyle, 4 national titles) is the closest Big Ten match to Olivier's Sydney background. Penn State, Michigan, Ohio State, and USC are the next tier. Washington (Seattle) and Oregon (Eugene) add Pacific Northwest options. Rutgers and Northwestern are the most accessible GPA entry points.

name: Big East Conference
prestige: Very Strong — #3-4 nationally, NYC-anchored
mlsPipeline: Strong — Georgetown 42 MLS signings under Wiese. Multiple Red Bulls/NYCFC connections from St John's.
desc: The Big East features many urban campuses across the East Coast, making it culturally diverse and clinically connected for students targeting health careers. Georgetown won the 2019 national championship under Brian Wiese. St. John's in Queens NYC has access to the Hospital for Special Surgery — the #1 orthopaedic hospital in the world. Creighton in Omaha is consistently top-10 nationally.
olivierNote: All 11 Big East schools now fully profiled. Georgetown (2019 champion, 42 MLS signings) and St. John's (NYC, Hospital for Special Surgery access) remain the top Olivier targets. Creighton is consistently top-10 nationally. UConn under Ray Reid is the strongest program in the Northeast. Big East is extremely competitive — strong highlights required. Marquette (Milwaukee) and Butler (Indianapolis) are the most accessible entry points for international recruits.

name: Southeastern Conference
prestige: Elite academic + athletic brand. Men's soccer at selected schools only.
mlsPipeline: Growing — Texas A&M consistent SEC producer. Gyasi Zardes (Columbus Crew, USMNT) most famous alum.
guideSchools: ⚠ UF — academic reference only (no men's varsity)
desc: The SEC sponsors men's soccer at only some member schools. Texas A&M is the guide's fully-profiled SEC program — Bobby Shuttleworth was appointed in December 2025 bringing a 2× national championship pedigree from Florida State. Texas A&M has one of the largest kinesiology departments in the US (~3,000 undergrads). UF is retained as an academic reference only — no men's varsity soccer.
olivierNote: Texas A&M is the SEC pick — massive kinesiology department, Shuttleworth's championship pedigree, warm climate. College Station is a college town not a major city. Trade-off: lifestyle vs elite academic/soccer development. Worth a contact email from Platform Sports Management.

name: American Athletic Conference
prestige: Very Strong — #5-6 nationally, rising fast
mlsPipeline: Strong and growing — FIU and USF are consistent MLS producers. FAU 2025 AAC Tournament Champions.
desc: The American Athletic Conference has emerged as a genuine high-major conference in soccer. FIU reached the AAC Championship Final in 2024 and 2025. FAU won the 2025 AAC Tournament. USF rebuilding under Kiefer (second tenure). The conference offers warm-climate campuses, strong exercise science degrees, and accessible D1 competition.
olivierNote: 13 guide schools in the AAC — the most complete AAC coverage in the guide. Florida trio (FIU, USF, FAU) are Olivier's top AAC fits — warm climate, accessible GPA, strong exercise science. FAU has the best explicit Pre-PT degree. FIU has the Inter Miami pipeline. Charlotte is the rising program (No.24 nationally 2025). Rice is the academic standout (Texas Medical Center adjacent). Navy and Army are listed for completeness — service commitment incompatible with DPT/MLS goals.

name: Big West Conference
prestige: Strong — dominant West Coast regional conference
mlsPipeline: Solid — Manu Duah #1 overall 2025 is the marquee recent example
desc: The Big West is the premier West Coast conference below the Big Ten. UCSB under Tim Vom Steeg (20+ year coach) produced Manu Duah as the #1 overall 2025 MLS pick — the highest ever Big West draft selection. Pacific coastal lifestyle makes Big West schools lifestyle matches for Sydney-raised players.
olivierNote: UCSB is the Big West pick — Vom Steeg is the most experienced coach in the guide, Mediterranean campus, and Manu Duah #1 overall 2025. The kinesiology degree is strong and the Santa Barbara lifestyle is the closest thing to Sydney in the US.

name: Ivy League
prestige: Academic elite — no athletic scholarships
mlsPipeline: Growing — Princeton 5 MLS players under Barlow. Kevin O'Toole (NYCFC 2022) most recent.
scholarships: ZERO athletic scholarships — need-based financial aid only
desc: The Ivy League offers need-based financial aid that can cover 100% of costs for qualifying families — but zero athletic scholarships. Princeton won the 2024 AND 2025 Ivy League Tournaments under Jim Barlow — the first program ever to win both the league and tournament in back-to-back years. Yale won in 2023. Admission requires 3.9+ GPA.
olivierNote: Princeton is surging — Jim Barlow has explicitly developed midfielders into MLS-calibre players. If Olivier's GPA climbs to 3.5+, a Princeton contact email through Platform Sports Management is worth attempting. The Ivy brand enormously enhances DPT school applications. No athletic scholarships is the critical barrier.

name: Colonial Athletic Association
prestige: Competitive mid-major — East Coast D1
mlsPipeline: Developing — Charleston Battery (USL) connection is the pro draw
desc: The CAA is a mid-major D1 conference spanning the East Coast. It now includes 9 fully-profiled guide schools — the most diverse conference coverage in the guide. Hofstra has won 4 consecutive CAA Tournament titles (2022-25) and earned a No.7 NCAA seed in 2024. Elon won the 2022 and 2025 CAA titles. Charleston's Keith Wiggans (Battery USL connection) is building steadily. Note: Delaware moved to CUSA in July 2025.
olivierNote: 9 CAA guide schools with full profiles. Hofstra is the dominant program — 4 consecutive titles, NYC access via LIRR, best development environment in the conference. Northeastern (Boston co-op clinical) and Drexel (Philly co-op) offer the best pre-PT pathways. Stony Brook has the best cost-to-clinical-access ratio (Stony Brook Medicine on campus, SUNY pricing). Charleston remains the only warm-climate CAA pick.

name: ASUN Conference
prestige: Developing mid-major — South and Southeast
mlsPipeline: Limited — USL League One/Two connections building at UCA
desc: The ASUN Conference is a mid-major D1 conference spanning the South and Southeast. UCA in Conway AR is 20 minutes from Little Rock — warm climate, affordable living, and a strong Kinesiology department with UAMS clinical network access. 6 of UCA's 9 midfielders clear before Olivier arrives — the most open central midfielder opportunity of any D1 in the guide.
olivierNote: UCA is the best value D1 in the guide — ~$28k/yr, warm climate, best MF opening of any D1, UAMS clinical network for pre-PT. Coach Segebart has an internationally diverse roster. Conway/Little Rock is not a coastal city but it's warm and affordable.

name: Mid-American Conference
prestige: Strong mid-major — Akron is top-20 MLS producer historically
mlsPipeline: Strong — Akron dominant MAC producer. 18 MLS picks under Coppinger era. Emil Jaaskelainen #7 overall 2024.
desc: The Mid-American Conference is the strongest mid-major soccer conference in the Midwest. Akron under Jared Embick (contract through 2035) is the dominant program — multiple MAC titles, 2021 College Cup Final Four, 18 MLS picks under Coppinger. The Cleveland Clinic partnership for pre-PT placement is a standout academic benefit.
olivierNote: Akron is the value pick of this entire guide. Top-20 MLS pipeline, explicit Pre-PT degree, Cleveland Clinic clinical access, coach to 2035. Cold Ohio winters are the only drawback. If Olivier prioritises career development over lifestyle, this is elite value at ~$32k/yr.

name: Western Athletic Conference
prestige: Growing mid-major — GCU 2025 Sweet 16 run elevated the conference
mlsPipeline: Developing — Dayne St. Clair (Minnesota United, USMNT) most famous WAC alum. GCU pipeline growing.
desc: The WAC is a growing mid-major conference with teams primarily in the Southwest. GCU's 2025 run to the NCAA Sweet 16 (beating UCLA and San Diego) was the program's most historic achievement. Jamie Davies was appointed December 2025 — bringing an elite turnaround record from UNF. GCU's Phoenix campus is exceptional: 28,000 students, world-class facilities, warm climate, Banner Health clinical network.
olivierNote: GCU is the best warm D1 city campus outside Florida and California. Phoenix gives Olivier the closest climate to Sydney of any non-coastal US city. Davies has a proven record of rapid program building. Kinesiology + Banner Health = legitimate pre-PT pathway.

name: West Coast Conference
prestige: Strong mid-major — Denver joining 2026 elevates the conference
mlsPipeline: Growing — Denver is the dominant new member. Cole Bassett (Colorado Rapids, USMNT) most famous recent alum.
guideSchools: Denver — University of Denver (fully profiled, joining WCC 2026)
desc: The West Coast Conference is a respected mid-major conference with strong academic institutions. Denver joins in 2026 — the most significant addition to WCC men's soccer in years. Denver's 5 consecutive Summit League titles and 2024 College Cup appearance makes them an immediate WCC contender. Jamie Franks is one of the most technically precise coaches in D1.
olivierNote: Denver is the WCC pick — 5 titles, College Cup 2024, outstanding Denver city lifestyle, and Franks is underrated. Kinesiology degree launched 2023 but NSCA-certified. Moving to WCC means stronger competition from 2026. Cold winters are the trade-off.

name: America East Conference
prestige: Mid-major — Vermont's 2024 national championship shocked the soccer world
mlsPipeline: Developing — Vermont's 2024 championship launched Kissel and Papp into MLS. Growing pipeline.
desc: The America East gained national attention when Vermont won the 2024 NCAA Championship — beating Marshall 2-1 in OT with a dramatic golden goal from Maximilian Kissel. Rob Dow built one of the most passionate soccer cultures in college sport. New coach Adrian Dubois in 2026. Burlington is cold but the soccer tradition is now elite.
olivierNote: Vermont is listed depth only — the climate and lifestyle are not a match for Olivier. The 2024 national championship is historic and program momentum under Dubois is worth monitoring. Not a priority target but worth awareness.

name: Sunshine State Conference
prestige: #1 D2 conference nationally — dominates national rankings
mlsPipeline: Best non-MLS pipeline — USL2, international pro signings annually from multiple SSC teams
desc: The Sunshine State Conference is consistently ranked as the top Division II conference in men's soccer nationally. PBA finished ranked #2 nationally in 2025. Barry has 4 all-time national championships. Lynn are the 2024 D2 national champions (20-0-2 undefeated). The entire conference is in South Florida — warm, coastal, and diverse.
olivierNote: The SSC is arguably the single best conference for Olivier's overall needs. 4 guide schools all in warm Florida cities within 60 minutes of each other. PBA is #2 nationally with Pre-PT in the degree title. Barry has the most D2 titles ever. Lynn 2024 champions. Nova SE has its own DPT program.

name: Lone Star Conference
prestige: Strong regional — Texas and Oklahoma
mlsPipeline: Developing — Austin FC (MLS) connections via St Edward's proximity
desc: The Lone Star Conference covers Texas and Oklahoma in Division II. St. Edward's in Austin is the flagship LSC soccer program, with Brian Young's possession-based attacking style producing consistent LSC Championship contenders. Austin FC (MLS) is headquartered nearby, creating a genuine professional pathway.
olivierNote: St. Edward's is the best Texas pick for Olivier. Brian Young's European pressing system is perfect for an 8/10 midfielder. Austin is warm, urban, and culturally dynamic. Austin FC pipeline is a rare MLS-affiliated pro pathway at D2 level.

name: California Collegiate Athletic Association
prestige: Competitive West Coast D2
mlsPipeline: Limited MLS; strong sport science career placement in LA
desc: The CCAA is the West Coast Division II conference featuring California State University system schools. Cal State LA has a dedicated School of Kinesiology and Nutritional Science. LA location means unparalleled clinical access and career placement in sports medicine and physical therapy.
olivierNote: Cal State LA is the most affordable LA option at ~$28k/yr. The kinesiology program is strong and the LA clinical network for pre-PT is outstanding. Not the most competitive soccer but the lifestyle and academic value are excellent.

name: Mountain East Conference
prestige: Regional D2 — Appalachian region
mlsPipeline: Limited — USL pathway developing. UC Charleston has Australian connection (Jack Allan).
desc: The Mountain East Conference covers West Virginia and the Mid-Atlantic in Division II. UC Charleston's CAMC hospital clinical partnership gives pre-PT students a legitimate clinical placement pathway. Jack Allan from Cape Schanck, Victoria is currently on UC Charleston's roster — a confirmed Australian recruiting connection.
olivierNote: UC Charleston is notable primarily for two reasons: Jack Allan (AUS) on the current roster confirms international recruiting, and the CAMC hospital partnership is a genuine pre-PT clinical pathway. Not a lifestyle match for Olivier but a viable option if other doors close.

name: Sooner Athletic Conference
prestige: Strong NAIA — Oklahoma City University tradition
mlsPipeline: NAIA level — semi-pro and international pathways
scholarships: Up to equivalent of full ride (NAIA)
desc: The Sooner Athletic Conference is a competitive NAIA conference in the South Central region. Oklahoma City University has a strong soccer tradition built by founder coach Brian Harvey (NAIA Hall of Fame) who played professionally in Australia. Billy Martin took over in 2020 continuing that legacy. NAIA offers generous scholarship packages not limited by equivalency caps.
olivierNote: OCU is the NAIA pick — Brian Finnegan's historical Australian connections, generous scholarships, warm Oklahoma City. Not a major coastal city lifestyle but solid soccer development and strong kinesiology pathway.

name: Sun Conference
prestige: Strong Florida NAIA — Keiser health sciences focus
mlsPipeline: Limited — health sciences pathway is the priority
scholarships: Up to equivalent of full ride (NAIA)
desc: The Sun Conference is a NAIA conference primarily in Florida. Keiser University is primarily a health sciences institution — the Clinical Simulation Centre at Keiser provides hands-on patient care simulation before graduate school, which is extremely rare at undergraduate level.
olivierNote: Keiser is the right choice if PT/Chiro pathway is the absolute priority over soccer profile. Fort Lauderdale warm and cosmopolitan. Clinical Simulation Centre gives pre-grad experience unavailable at most US programs.

name: Southern CA Intercollegiate Athletic Conference
prestige: Strong D3 — best D3 conference in California
mlsPipeline: None (D3) — academic/PT pathway focus
scholarships: ZERO athletic scholarships — merit and need-based aid only
desc: SCIAC is the premier Division III conference in Southern California. Chapman University's KIN 405 Pre-Physical Therapy Prep is a required course — the only program in the guide with this mandatory pre-PT preparation. Orange County clinical network (Hoag Hospital, CHOC) provides excellent DPT observation hours.
olivierNote: Chapman D3 = less schedule pressure = better GPA performance for PT grad school applications. No athletic scholarships but merit aid and the Hoag Hospital clinical network are strong compensators. Orange County is 30 minutes from LA.

name: Junior College Conferences (CCCAA / NJCAA)
prestige: Transfer pathway — not a career destination
mlsPipeline: Pathway — SMC → UCLA transfer pipeline is the most proven in California
scholarships: Athletic grants + need-based aid (varies by state)
guideSchools: Northeast Community College (NJCAA DII) — Norfolk, NE
Monroe University Mustangs (NJCAA DI) — New Rochelle, NY
Indian Hills CC (NJCAA DI) — Ottumwa, IA
Tyler Junior College (NJCAA DI) — Tyler, TX
Daytona State College (NJCAA DI) — Daytona Beach, FL
Barton Community College (NJCAA DI / KJCCC) — Great Bend, KS
Cowley County Community College (NJCAA DI / KJCCC) — Arkansas City, KS
Arizona Western College (NJCAA DI / ACCAC) — Yuma, AZ
Eastern Florida State College (NJCAA DI / FCSAA) — Melbourne, FL
Phoenix College (NJCAA DII / ACCAC) — Phoenix, AZ
Pima Community College (NJCAA DII / ACCAC) — Tucson, AZ
Mohave Community College (NJCAA DI / ACCAC) — Bullhead City, AZ
Glendale Community College (NJCAA DII / ACCAC) — Glendale, AZ
Dodge City Community College (NJCAA DI / KJCCC) — Dodge City, KS
Neosho County Community College (NJCAA DII / KJCCC) — Chanute, KS
Southeastern Community College (NJCAA DII / ICCAC) — West Burlington, IA
Iowa Lakes Community College (NJCAA DII / ICCAC) — Estherville, IA
Blinn College (NJCAA DI / Region 14) — Brenham, TX
Coastal Bend College (NJCAA DI / Region 14) — Beeville, TX
Angelina College (NJCAA DI / Region 14) — Lufkin, TX
LSU Eunice (NJCAA DI / Region 14) — Eunice, LA
Nassau Community College (NJCAA DI / Region 15) — Garden City, NY
Ulster County Community College (NJCAA DI / Region 15) — Stone Ridge, NY
Suffolk County Community College (NJCAA DI / Region 15) — Selden, NY
Westchester Community College (NJCAA DI / Region 15) — Valhalla, NY
Johnson County Community College (NJCAA DII / KJCCC) — Overland Park, KS
desc: Community college and junior college programs serve as 2-year transfer platforms. 29 guide schools now span all 6 NJCAA regions represented in the guide (Region 1 AZ, Region 6 KS, Region 8 FL, Region 11 IA/NE, Region 14 TX/LA, Region 15 NY), plus Santa Monica College (CCCAA, non-NJCAA). Phoenix College (Phoenix, AZ) are the 2025 NJCAA DII National Champions, ranked #1 nationally for 7 straight weeks. Indian Hills CC (Ottumwa, IA) are the 2025 NJCAA DI National Champions under Zac Newton. Daytona State College (Daytona Beach, FL) were the 2025 NJCAA DI finalists — top-5 D1 transfer feeder, warm Florida lifestyle. Tyler Junior College (Tyler, TX) is the #1 JUCO D1 transfer feeder nationally. Monroe University Mustangs (New Rochelle, NY) are 3× NJCAA DI National Champions with Australian alumni on roster. Santa Monica College (Santa Monica, CA) has the best documented transfer pipeline to UCLA in California at ~$9k/yr. Suffolk County CC (Selden, NY) won the 2025 NJCAA Region 15 Championship. Arizona Western College is ranked #2 nationally (2025) with a genuine Exercise, Wellness and Nutrition degree. Eastern Florida State plays in a 1,000-seat stadium-grade facility with back-to-back national tournament runs.
olivierNote: Phoenix College is now the guide's most decorated current JUCO — 2025 national champions, warm major-city Arizona campus, confirmed dedicated Exercise Science degree. Indian Hills is the DI national champion — elite performance play, cold rural Iowa. Daytona State is the best lifestyle JUCO — warm Florida beach city, 2025 national finalist, top-5 D1 transfer feeder. Tyler JC is the #1 D1 transfer record nationally — warm East Texas city. Monroe is NYC metro lifestyle with 3× NJCAA DI titles; Suffolk County CC (also NYC metro, 2025 Region 15 champions) is the only Lower New York JUCO with a confirmed dedicated Exercise Science degree. Santa Monica is the Sydney-lifestyle match — ocean, LA culture, → UCLA pipeline. Arizona Western pairs a #2 national ranking with warm desert climate and a real Exercise/Wellness/Nutrition degree. Eastern Florida State has the best dedicated soccer stadium (1,000 seats) among guide JUCOs plus warm Space Coast lifestyle. Cowley, Barton, Dodge City, and Neosho County (all Kansas) are nationally ranked but a poor climate fit; Johnson County CC (Overland Park, KS) offers the same conference at a genuine Kansas City metro campus. 29 guide schools — all 2-year transfer platforms.

name: Northeast Conference
prestige: Mid-Major
mlsPipeline: Developing — NEC programs feed regional USL and NPSL pipelines
scholarships: NCAA D1 — up to 9.9 equivalencies (men's soccer)
guideSchools: Mercyhurst University (Erie, PA) — joined the NEC in Fall 2024; won the NEC regular-season title in that first D1 season
desc: The Northeast Conference is a mid-major D1 conference primarily located in the Northeast US corridor (NY, NJ, PA, CT, MD). Mercyhurst University joined the NEC in Fall 2024 — the program's first season at the NCAA D1 level after competing in D2 PSAC — and won the NEC regular-season title in that debut year. The conference spans from Long Island to Pittsburgh, with institutions ranging from 1,200 to 10,000 students. NEC soccer competes for an automatic NCAA Tournament bid each season.
olivierNote: Mercyhurst is the only NEC school in this guide, and it is stronger than its Fit Score implies: HC Austin Solomon won the NEC regular-season title in the program's first D1 season (2024) and his staff was named NEC Coaching Staff of the Year, before a fall to 8th in 2025. Note that Mercyhurst is a provisional D1 member and is not eligible for the NCAA championship postseason until 2028–29 — Olivier's first season (2027–28) sits inside that window. B.S. Exercise Science at Mercyhurst has a 500-hour clinical internship. Cost at ~$63k is offset by 93% of students receiving aid averaging $31k.

name: Central Atlantic Collegiate Conference
prestige: Regional D2
mlsPipeline: Regional USL and NPSL pathway
scholarships: NCAA D2 — up to 9.0 equivalencies (men's soccer)
guideSchools: Georgian Court University (Lakewood, NJ) — Dino Raso, 2024 CACC Coach of the Year
desc: The Central Atlantic Collegiate Conference is a D2 conference primarily in the NY/NJ/PA/DE corridor. Georgian Court University (Lakewood, NJ) is the guide school — coach Dino Raso won the 2024 CACC Coach of the Year award, the first ever for GCU. The program runs a B.S. Exercise Science Wellness & Sports with explicit Pre-PT/OT/PA tracks.
olivierNote: Georgian Court is the CACC entry. Dino Raso (13th season, 2024 CACC Coach of Year) has built a consistent D2 program on the Jersey Shore. The Exercise Science Pre-PT track is one of the stronger academic offerings at this level. Jersey Shore beaches 20 min from campus, NYC 90 min north.

name: American Midwest Conference
prestige: NAIA
mlsPipeline: NAIA level — USL League Two pathway
scholarships: NAIA — athletic aid available, no equivalency cap
guideSchools: Columbia College (Columbia, MO) — ⚠ No Exercise Science degree
desc: The American Midwest Conference is a NAIA conference primarily in Missouri, Iowa, and surrounding states. Columbia College (Columbia, MO) is the guide school — new coach Nathan Mason is rebuilding after significant roster turnover. ⚠ Columbia College does NOT offer Exercise Science — Healthcare Management and General Studies only.
olivierNote: ⚠ Columbia College MO is the value play — 7,556/yr sticker price with significant athletic aid potential. The degree limitation (no Exercise Science) is critical for a DPT-track student-athlete. Best as a cost-first option if Olivier plans to complete pre-req courses separately at nearby University of Missouri.
